results.title: 27 more Indian airports to have DigiYatra by next year
results.description: Passenger data shared with DigiYatra remains encrypted and securely stored on the user's own device, shared only for a limited duration with the origin airport for immediate verification purposes, the ministry said.

results.title: DK Shivakumar Meets Karnataka Governor, To Take CM Oath On June 3
results.description: Karnataka Congress president D K Shivakumar has staked claim to form the government after being unanimously elected leader of the Congress Legislature Party (CLP). Shivakumar met Governor Thaawarchand Gehlot at Raj Bhavan shortly after the CLP meeting at Vidhana Soudha in Bengaluru. Outgoing chief minister Siddaramaiah proposed Shivakumar’s name, which was seconded by senior leader G. Parameshwara and unanimously approved by party legislators. The meeting was overseen by Congress leaders KC Venugopal and Randeep Singh Surjewala. The CLP also passed a resolution appreciating Siddaramaiah’s tenure as chief minister. Following Siddaramaiah’s resignation and the dissolution of the Council of Ministers, Shivakumar is now set to take oath as Karnataka’s next chief minister on June 3 in Bengaluru.

results.title: Viral video: CarryMinati recreates PM Narendra Modi- Giorgia Meloni's Melody moment with MrBeast, internet can't handle it: 'No way, it's AI'
results.description: Prime Minister Narendra Modi can make anything viral, and his recent Melody moment with Georgia Meloni has now inspired countless memes, including the one from CarryMinati and MrBeast.

results.title: Haryana’s Food, Supplies Department asks DCs to restrict sale of High Speed Diesel
results.description: The Food, Civil Supplies and Consumer Affairs Department, Haryana, on Saturday asked deputy commissioners and District Food and Supplies Controllers (DFSCs) to restrict the unusually high sale and unauthorised inter-state movement of High Speed Diesel from retail pumps. results.title: Dope test to be mandatory before appointment in government service: Himachal CM Sukhvinder Singh Sukhu
results.description: Sukhvinder Singh Sukhu directed all departments to make a dope test mandatory for candidates prior to their appointment in government service and asked them to issue the necessary guidelines for this purpose.

results.title: Transporters pause operations in Manipur in protest against trucker’s killing
results.description: Transporters halt operations in Manipur, protesting a trucker's killing by Kuki militants, threatening essential supply routes to Imphal.
